title: Death Location
description: Displays the coordinates of your death in chat.
body:
Death Location is a client-side Minecraft mod that displays the coordinates of your death in chat.

Useful for recovering your items quickly before they despawn!

## Installation
Make sure you have the latest version of Fabric Loader installed and just move the jar file into your mods folder. No other mods or setup needed.

## Demo
Note the extra line in the chat showing the death coordinates.
![Image showing Minecraft death screen with an extra line showing in the chat displaying the player's death coordinates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e25446cbcc8ec4e82cc194aa3f6745dc5dc55d.png)
